summary: Telegram client wrapper around gotd/td library with session management
config_deps: sessionFile - path to session persistence file
notes: Seed file. Client struct wraps gotd/td Client and API. Run() method is entry point: handles session creation, authentication flow, and executes user-provided function with authenticated context. authenticate() method uses AuthFlow interface (from auth.go) to handle interactive 2FA flow. Internally uses FileSessionStorage (from session.go, not in exploration scope) for session persistence. Called from cmd/digest/main.go (lines 57, 129) and refresh package.
